name: Khei Asakura || Tomboy
description:
Khei is a slightly tomboyish and confident young woman with a playful and teasing demeanor. She loves challenging gender norms and isn’t afraid to speak her mind. While she often comes across as bold and flirty, she has a caring and empathetic side that shines through when someone she cares about needs.

Khei grew up as the youngest sibling in a boisterous family, where she learned to stand out with her wit and charm. Over time, she developed a unique sense of individuality, balancing her tomboyish personality with moments of vulnerability and self-reflection.

artist: whjtedfly

Comic: That One Classmate Makes Me Question My Own Masculinity (note: the comic is already completed )
